name: Install Shell
description: Install Bash and Zsh shells, add plugins and themes, and set up robust configuration files.

install_zsh.description: Install Zsh. Bash is always installed.

install_ohmyzsh.description: Install Oh My Zsh when installing Zsh. Ignored if Zsh is not available or being installed.

install_fonts.description: Install the [Nerd Fonts](https://www.nerdfonts.com) files to `font_dir` and refresh the font cache.

ohmyzsh_plugins.description:
Comma-separated list of Oh My Zsh custom plugins to install, each as a `owner/repo` GitHub slug.
The repository is cloned into `<ohmyzsh_custom_dir>/plugins/<repo>`.
Set to an empty string to install no custom plugins.
Ignored if Oh My Zsh is not available or being installed.

ohmybash_plugins.description:
Comma-separated list of Oh My Bash custom plugins to install, each as a `owner/repo` GitHub slug.
The repository is cloned into `<ohmybash_install_dir>/custom/plugins/<repo>`.
Set to an empty string to install no custom plugins.
Ignored if Oh My Bash is not available or being installed.

ohmyzsh_theme.description:
Oh My Zsh custom theme to install, as a `owner/repo` GitHub slug (e.g., 'romkatv/powerlevel10k' for the [Powerlevel10k](https://github.com/romkatv/powerlevel10k) theme).
The repository is cloned into `<ohmyzsh_custom_dir>/themes/<repo>`.
 Set to an empty string to install no custom theme.
Ignored if Oh My Zsh is not available or being installed.

ohmybash_theme.description:
Oh My Bash custom theme to install, as a `owner/repo` GitHub slug.
The repository is cloned into `<ohmybash_install_dir>/custom/themes/<repo>`.
Ignored if Oh My Bash is not available or being installed.

ohmyzsh_install_dir.description:
Path to the Oh My Zsh installation directory.
This is the directory where Oh My Zsh will be installed.
It corresponds to the [`ZSH`](https://github.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/wiki/Settings#zsh)
configuration variable in Oh My Zsh.

ohmybash_install_dir.description:
Path to the Oh My Bash installation directory.
This is the directory where Oh My Bash will be installed.

ohmyzsh_branch.description:
Branch or tag of the ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh repository to clone.
Also recorded as `oh-my-zsh.branch` in the git config so `omz update` works correctly.

ohmybash_branch.description: Branch or tag of the ohmybash/ohmybash repository to clone.

add_root_user_config.description: Whether to add configuration for the root user. If true, root will get the same configuration files, Oh My Zsh/Oh My Bash installation, plugins, and themes as specified by the other options.

add_current_user_config.description: Whether to add configuration for the current non-root user. If true, the user will get the same configuration files, Oh My Zsh/Oh My Bash installation, plugins, and themes as specified by the other options.

add_container_user_config.description: Whether to add configuration for the `containerUser` set in the devcontainer.json file. If true, the user will get the same configuration files, Oh My Zsh/Oh My Bash installation, plugins, and themes as specified by the other options.

add_remote_user_config.description: Whether to add configuration for the `remoteUser` set in the devcontainer.json file. If true, the user will get the same configuration files, Oh My Zsh/Oh My Bash installation, plugins, and themes as specified by the other options.

add_user_config.description: Comma-separated list of usernames to add configuration for, in addition to the users specified by the other `add_*_user_config` options.

set_user_shells.description:
Whether to set users' default login shell to zsh or bash via `chsh`.
 Applies to all users for whom configuration is being added, as determined by the `add_*_user_config` options. Raises an error if zsh is selected but zsh is not available or being installed.

zdotdir.description:
Directory where Zsh looks for its per-user config files (`.zshrc`, `.zprofile`, `.zlogin`).
Corresponds to the `ZDOTDIR` environment variable set in `~/.zshenv`.
Leave empty to use the default: `${XDG_CONFIG_HOME}/zsh` (i.e. `~/.config/zsh`).
Accepts `~`- or `$HOME`-prefixed paths.

ohmyzsh_custom_dir.description:
ZSH_CUSTOM directory for Oh My Zsh.
Leave empty to use `${ZDOTDIR}/custom` (i.e. `~/.config/zsh/custom`) — per-user, themes and plugins are symlinked there from the system install.
Set to an explicit path to override; `~`- and `$HOME`-prefixed values are expanded per user.

ohmybash_custom_dir.description:
OSH_CUSTOM directory for Oh My Bash.
Leave empty to use `${XDG_CONFIG_HOME}/bash/custom` (i.e. `~/.config/bash/custom`) — per-user, themes and plugins are symlinked there from the system install.
Set to an explicit path to override; `~`- and `$HOME`-prefixed values are expanded per user.

font_names.description:
Comma-separated list of [Nerd Fonts](https://www.nerdfonts.com) archive names to install (e.g. `Meslo,JetBrainsMono,FiraCode`).
Each name must match an archive filename from the [nerd-fonts releases](https://github.com/ryanoasis/nerd-fonts/releases) (without the extension).
When the Oh My Zsh theme is `romkatv/powerlevel10k`, the p10k-specific *MesloLGS NF* fonts are installed automatically.
Ignored if `install_fonts` is false.

font_dir.description: Path to the directory where fonts will be downloaded.

user_config_mode.description:
How to handle existing user dotfiles when configuring users.
- `overwrite`: Replace all dotfiles from skel and re-inject framework blocks.
- `augment`: Copy skel files only if they do not already exist; always refresh framework blocks.
- `skip`: Do nothing if dotfiles already exist.

logfile.description: Log all output (stdout + stderr) to this file in addition to console.
